name: Polling Deduplication Hook
goal: Add a SQLite-backed poll-dedup.sh hook that blocks workers from reading the same resource 3+ consecutive times when output is unchanged, with a 5-minute cooldown.

tasks.name: Schema migration
tasks.description: Add tool_poll_state table and index to session-init.sh schema bootstrap and db.ts initDb(). Idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS.

steps.description: Add tool_poll_state CREATE TABLE to session-init.sh before the CREATE INDEX block
steps.expected: Table DDL inserted inside the sqlite3 quoted string, after review_grades closing );

steps.description: Add idx_poll_state_session CREATE INDEX to session-init.sh
steps.expected: Index DDL inserted before the closing quote of the sqlite3 call

steps.description: Add tool_poll_state CREATE TABLE to db.ts initDb() after review_grades table
steps.expected: Table DDL inserted before the closing backtick of the first db.exec block

steps.description: Add idx_poll_state_session CREATE INDEX to db.ts index block
steps.expected: Index DDL inserted before the closing backtick of the second db.exec block

tasks.name: Create poll-dedup.sh hook
tasks.description: New dual-mode bash hook: PostToolUse tracks output hash and consecutive count, PreToolUse blocks if count >= 3 and cooldown not elapsed. Uses portable_md5 from hook-logger.sh and SQLite for state.

steps.description: Create worker/hooks/poll-dedup.sh with complete dual-mode hook implementation
steps.expected: File created with all functions: compute_input_hash, age_seconds, PreToolUse branch, PostToolUse branch

tasks.name: Register hook in hooks.json
tasks.description: Add PreToolUse and PostToolUse registrations for poll-dedup.sh matching Read|Bash|Grep|Glob. Uses stable path $HOME/.claude/ironclaude-hooks/poll-dedup.sh (auto-copied by session-init.sh).

steps.description: Add PreToolUse registration for Read|Bash|Grep|Glob after the Task matcher entry
steps.expected: New JSON object with poll-dedup.sh command and Read|Bash|Grep|Glob matcher added to PreToolUse array

steps.description: Add PostToolUse registration for Read|Bash|Grep|Glob after the mcp-state-logger entry
steps.expected: New JSON object with poll-dedup.sh command and Read|Bash|Grep|Glob matcher added to PostToolUse array

tasks.name: Write and run test-poll-dedup.sh
tasks.description: Logic unit tests for poll-dedup.sh. Tests isolated functions (block decision, count update, input key construction) without a live DB. Follows test-guard-security.sh pattern.

steps.description: Create worker/hooks/test-poll-dedup.sh with 15 test cases covering block decision, count update, and input key construction
steps.expected: File created with assert_eq helper, three logic function replicas, and 15 assertions
